examples: He crouched behind a low hedgerow.
No hanging or airing on trees or hedgerow.
The leaves, still green, tossed off the hedgerow trees by the wind.
Hedgerow, thick and briary, caught his shirt twice and made it ragged round the elbow.
The land the group farms covers about 2, 400 acres (1, 000 hectares), of which nearly 5% is woodland, pond and hedgerow.
